authors: Ståle Grut Department of Media and Communication
raw_title: Future Imaginaries of Visual Open Source Investigative Journalism
title_en: Future Imaginaries of Visual Open Source Investigative Journalism
title_zh: 视觉开源调查新闻的未来想象
plain_summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨了如何利用公开的视觉材料和数字工具进行新闻调查，并展望了这种方法的未来发展。
plain_summary_en: This paper explores how journalists can use publicly available visual materials and digital tools for investigative reporting, and looks at potential future developments in this field.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻调查方法的创新与演变，特别是开源情报和视觉分析在新闻业中的应用前景。
research_direction_en: Investigating innovations and evolution in journalistic investigation methods in the digital age, particularly the application prospects of open source intelligence and visual analysis in journalism.
